---
name: create-demo-llm-chat-application
description: Create a demo LLM Chat application using GitHub models and Python OpenAI SDK and streamlit
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-skill in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

- Create a simple LLM Chat completion in Python using OpenAI SDK and GitHub Model GPT-4o-mini.
- Send the prompt "Tell me a dad joke today"
- Wrap this into a streamlit web application in a file "web.py" 
- run the "web.py" using "streamlit run" 
- The web app should have a text input for the prompt and a submit button to get the response from the model and display it on the page.
